title: Silicon Valley - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Silicon Valley - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
Khoury College in Silicon Valley
A welcoming campus at the heart of tech
Northeastern’s Silicon Valley campus offers an experience full of opportunity with industry partners right around the corner. It’s the perfect place for you to launch or accelerate your career in computer science. Located in downtown San Jose in the San Pedro neighborhood, it offers easy access to mountains, the beach, and a buzzing creative scene.
A place for your tech career to bloom
Join students, staff, and faculty as they showcase the Silicon Valley campus in downtown San Jose.

Silicon Valley
A world of opportunities
Globally renowned Silicon Valley is a top areas to launch your tech career. Your studies take place right at the heart of the tech industry on a beautiful urban campus.
With a significant tech presence from Amazon and Apple to startups and companies unique to the area, Silicon Valley has a need for Khoury College students. Northeastern’s industry partners provide internship and co-op opportunities, as well as projects integrated into experiential learning coursework. This industry-focused learning translates into real-world experience and careers.

A campus and a city full of opportunity
With outdoor spaces, beautiful views, dedicated study areas, a game room, a fitness center, a basketball court and even a putting green, Silicon Valley offers lots of opportunities to connect with classmates and build great friendships. Networking events hosted throughout the week provide great opportunities to meet the people who will be your colleagues in the near future.
In the heart of downtown San Jose, parks like the Plaza de Cézar Chávez are an ideal place to study and unwind after class. The San Pedro neighborhood provides plenty of access to the sunny California weather and local attractions like the San Jose Museum of Art and the San Pedro Square Market.

Everything you need right on campus
Join student LeAnn Mendoza on a tour of the Silicon Valley campus from state-of-the-art classrooms to panoramic views.
Featured faculty: Lama Hamandi
Lama Hamandi is an associate teaching professor at the Khoury College of Computer Sciences at Northeastern University. Her research focuses on systems and networking.
